title: Private Modifier
description: Protect internal class data from external access using the private keyword.
problemStatement:
Encapsulation! Create a class `BankAccount` with a `private` property `balance` initialized to `0`.

**Requirement:** Add a public method `deposit(amount: number)` that updates the private balance.
hints: Private properties cannot be accessed from outside the class instances.
expectedOutput: A class with protected internal state
